calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien; Request For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES

is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Fees granted in the amount of $3,130.10. =(501/CFH)

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien; Request For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Continued To Oct-04-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM LIEN; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES

Appearances via Zoom: James Sansone of Carle Mackie Power & Ross (707.526.4200) for petitioner and moving party; Mitchell Chyette of the Law Office of Mitchell Chyette (510.388.3748) for respondent and opposing party.

The Court makes a personal disclosure, and no objections are raised. Mr. Chyette requests a continuance of the matter to file an opposition. There is no objection to the request. The matter is continued to October 4, 2023, on agreement of counsel. Any opposition and reply may be filed according to code. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/HEK)
